annotation_source: Blind AI frame-inspection annotation (Claude Opus 4.8 agents, 2026-06-10): annotators saw op/intent/target/expected_state + before/after frames only — verifier verdicts were hidden to avoid anchoring; cant_tell labels and a random spot-check subset got an independent second review. NOT a blind HUMAN annotation; frames live in local gitignored artifacts, so the repo carries verdicts+annotations+scoring, not re-verifiable pixels.

samples.verifier_reason: page_id mismatch: expected one of ('settings/__machinery_probe_unreachable__',), got 'ios_settings_app_clips' after VLM escalation
